import React, {useEffect, useRef, useState} from 'react'; function User(props){ const {isPreferencesEnable} = props; const [aberto, setAberto] = useState(false); const menuRef = useRef(null); useEffect(() => { const handleClickOutside = (event) => { if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(event.target)) { setAberto(false); } }; document.addEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside); return () => { document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handleClickOutside); } }, []); console.log("user:" + isPreferencesEnable); return (
